rulings.Case Title: WILSON VS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORIT
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR WILSON TO PLEAD COMPLIANCE WITH GOVERNMENT CLAIMS ACT. DENY AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY IS TO SUE UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 830 ET SEQ. AND 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION PLEADS SUCH A CAUSE OF ACTION. GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION. PERMITTING SUCH A CAUSE OF ACTION WOULD EVISCERATE THE GENERAL RULE OF IMMUNITY AND ZELIG REASONING IS PERSUASIVE. (302/AJR/PB)
